Auth.signInToOikos: Sign in to your Oikos account
Auth.startEquipping: Start equipping your family. Free forever.
Auth.agreeToTerms: I agree to the <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>
Auth.enterEmailForReset: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
Auth.resetEmailSent: If an account exists for <bold>{email}</bold>, you'll receive a reset link shortly. Check your spam folder if you don't see it.
Auth.makeSureLength: Make sure it's at least 10 characters long.
Auth.passwordResetSuccess: Your password has been reset. Signing you in…

Validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
Validation.emailLength: Email must be 255 characters or fewer.
Validation.passwordLength: Password must be 128 characters or fewer.
Validation.firstNameLength: Name must be 100 characters or fewer.
Validation.lastNameLength: Name must be 100 characters or fewer.
Validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 10 characters.
Validation.passwordUppercase: Include at least one uppercase letter.
Validation.passwordLowercase: Include at least one lowercase letter.
Validation.passwordSpecial: Include at least one special character.
Validation.agreeToTermsRequired: You must agree to the Terms of Service to create an account.

ApiErrors.accountLocked: Your account has been temporarily locked. Try again later.
ApiErrors.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please wait before trying again.
ApiErrors.accountExists: An account with this email already exists.
ApiErrors.invalidToken: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
ApiErrors.noToken: No reset token found in url.
ApiErrors.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Onboarding.step1Sub: Tell us who you are — this is how your family will appear in Oikos.
Onboarding.familyNameHelp: This is how your family will appear to others in the community. It can be a surname, a given name, or anything that feels like home.
Onboarding.shieldHelp: Your coat of arms is your family's visual identity in Oikos. It appears on your profile, your children's journals, and in the community directory.
Onboarding.locationHelp: Used to help you connect with nearby families. Never shared without your permission.
Onboarding.step2Heading: Tell us about your faith and values.
Onboarding.step2Sub: This helps your AI assistant understand who you are and respond in a way that aligns with your beliefs.
Onboarding.worldviewLabel: Any teaching convictions we should know about? (optional)
Onboarding.worldviewPlaceholder: We teach from a young-earth creationist perspective. We use the Westminster Catechism.
Onboarding.worldviewHelp: The AI assistant will use this to avoid conflict with your convictions and lean into your framework.
Onboarding.step3Heading: How does your family approach education?
Onboarding.step3Sub: This shapes the default tone and approach of lesson plans, resource suggestions, and discussion questions.
Onboarding.educationPurposeHelp: This helps us tailor the experience to your family's needs.
Onboarding.educationHelp: Select up to 3 methods. The first selection is your primary approach.
Onboarding.curriculumPlaceholder: Type a curriculum name and press Enter…
Onboarding.languagesPlaceholder: Type a language and press Enter…
Onboarding.step4Heading: Finally — tell us about your family in your own words.
Onboarding.step4Sub: This is optional but powerful. The more you share, the more your AI assistant will feel like it knows your family.
Onboarding.cultureLabel: Describe your family culture (optional but powerful)
Onboarding.culturePlaceholder: We are a family of six living on a small farm in rural Ireland. We prioritise slow mornings with Scripture reading, followed by structured academics until noon and free exploration in the afternoons…
Onboarding.cultureHelp: This is the most important thing you can give the AI assistant. Write as much or as little as you like.
Onboarding.visibilityHelp: You can change this at any time in Settings. Your location is never shown more precisely than city level.
Onboarding.childrenSub: Add one or more children to your family. You can always add more later from your family settings.
Onboarding.skipConfirm: You can add children later from your family settings.
Onboarding.childDobLabel: Date of birth or approximate age
Onboarding.dobOption: I'll enter their date of birth
Onboarding.ageOption: I'll just enter their approximate age
Onboarding.childGradeHint: Auto-suggested from age, but you can override it.
Onboarding.childLearningStyleLabel: How does this child learn best?
Onboarding.childPersonalityLabel: How would you describe this child's personality?
Onboarding.childPersonalityPlaceholder: Elias is a deeply curious, introverted nine-year-old who loves building things and asking big questions…
Onboarding.childInterestsLabel: What does this child love? (interests, hobbies, passions)
Onboarding.childInterestsPlaceholder: Type an interest and press Enter…
Onboarding.childMotivatorsPlaceholder: Sticker charts, working alongside mum, clear goals, short bursts with breaks
Onboarding.childDemotivatorsLabel: What tends to frustrate or discourage this child?
Onboarding.childDemotivatorsPlaceholder: Open-ended instructions, long reading sessions without discussion, being timed
Onboarding.childNeedsIntro: This information is private and used only to help the AI assistant adapt its approach. It is never shared.
Onboarding.childDifferencesLabel: Does this child have any learning differences or diagnoses? (optional)
Onboarding.childAccommodationsLabel: Any accommodations or approaches that help?
Onboarding.childAccommodationsPlaceholder: Extra time on written work. Prefers dictating answers. Needs movement breaks every 20 minutes.
Onboarding.childSupportPlaceholder: Type a service and press Enter…
Onboarding.welcomeToast: Welcome to Oikos, {familyName}! Now let's meet your children.
Onboarding.coatOfArmsHeading: Design Your Family Coat of Arms
Onboarding.coatOfArmsSub: This is your family's visual identity in Oikos. It appears on your profile, your children's journals, and in the community directory. Take your time — you can always change it later.
Onboarding.coatOfArmsSkip: Skip for now — I'll do this later

Dashboard.encouragement: Every day you show up for your children is a day well spent. You are their most important teacher.
Dashboard.quickAccess: Where would you like to start?

Subjects.title: Subject Library
Subjects.subtitle: Browse all subjects available to your family
Subjects.emptyDescription: Start by creating your first subject or browsing platform subjects.
Subjects.shortDescPlaceholder: A brief description of this subject
Subjects.learningObjectivesPlaceholder: Type an objective and press Enter
Subjects.skillsPlaceholder: Type a skill and press Enter
Subjects.tagHint: Type and press Enter to add
Subjects.visibilityHint: When enabled, other Oikos families can discover and fork this subject. Your name is not shown — only the subject content is shared.
Subjects.deleteConfirmInUse: This subject is used in {count} curricula. Remove it from those curricula first, or archive it instead.
Subjects.archiveConfirmMessage: Hidden from pickers; history preserved. You can unarchive any time.

Curriculums.title: Curriculums
Curriculums.subtitle: Plan and manage your family's curriculum
Curriculums.emptyDescription: Create your first curriculum to start planning your children's education.
Curriculums.completeConfirmMessage: {count} future lessons will be marked as skipped.
Curriculums.templateConfirmMessage: This curriculum will be removed from all children and saved as a template.
Curriculums.goalsPlaceholder: Type a goal and press Enter
Curriculums.subject: Subject
Curriculums.noChildrenTitle: No children in your family yet
Curriculums.noChildrenDescription: You need to add at least one child before creating a curriculum.
Curriculums.addChildLink: Add a child in Family Settings
Curriculums.tagHint: Type and press Enter to add
Curriculums.activateConflictMessage: One or more children already have an active curriculum. Activating this one will pause their current active curriculum.

WeekPlanner.title: Weekly Routine
WeekPlanner.subtitle: Plan your family's recurring weekly schedule
WeekPlanner.clearWeekConfirm: Remove all entries from this template? This cannot be undone.
WeekPlanner.deleteConfirm: Remove this entry from the schedule?
WeekPlanner.conflictError: {name} already has a subject scheduled at this time
WeekPlanner.createFirstTemplate: Create your first weekly template to start planning.
WeekPlanner.noChildren: No children found. Add children in Family settings first.
WeekPlanner.noSubjects: No subjects found. Create subjects first.
WeekPlanner.deleteConfirmAll: Remove this entry from all {count} days?
WeekPlanner.deleteRoutineConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this routine? This cannot be undone.
WeekPlanner.saveRoutineDescription: This will create a copy of the current routine with a new name.
WeekPlanner.noCurriculum: No active curriculum. Set up a curriculum first.
WeekPlanner.noSubjectsInCurriculum: No subjects in the active curriculum yet.

Children.title: Children
Children.emptyDescription: Add your first child to start planning their education.
Children.archiveBody: Archiving {name} will hide them from your active roster. All their lessons, journal entries, and projects will be preserved. You can restore them at any time from Settings.
Children.childNotFoundDesc: This child does not belong to your family or does not exist.
Children.childDobLabel: Date of birth or approximate age
Children.dobOption: I'll enter their date of birth
Children.ageOption: I'll just enter their approximate age
Children.childGradeHint: Auto-suggested from age, but you can override it.
Children.childLearningStyleLabel: How does this child learn best?
Children.childPersonalityLabel: How would you describe this child's personality?
Children.childPersonalityPlaceholder: A deeply curious, introverted child who loves building things and asking big questions…
Children.childInterestsLabel: What does this child love? (interests, hobbies, passions)
Children.childInterestsPlaceholder: Type an interest and press Enter…
Children.childMotivatorsPlaceholder: Sticker charts, working alongside mum, clear goals, short bursts with breaks
Children.childDemotivatorsLabel: What tends to frustrate or discourage this child?
Children.childDemotivatorsPlaceholder: Open-ended instructions, long reading sessions without discussion, being timed
Children.childNeedsIntro: This information is private and used only to help the AI assistant adapt its approach. It is never shared.
Children.childDifferencesLabel: Does this child have any learning differences or diagnoses? (optional)
Children.childAccommodationsLabel: Any accommodations or approaches that help?
Children.childAccommodationsPlaceholder: Extra time on written work. Prefers dictating answers. Needs movement breaks every 20 minutes.
Children.childSupportPlaceholder: Type a service and press Enter…

Projects.title: Projects
Projects.subtitle: Create and track learning projects for your children
Projects.emptyDescription: Projects turn learning into living. Create your first one.
Projects.purposePlaceholder: Who will benefit from this work? What is it for?
Projects.assignChildrenHelp: Select one or more children for this project
Projects.milestonesHelp: Milestones represent meaningful phases of work
Projects.activateConfirmMessage: Activating this project will move it from Draft to Active. You can still edit it while it's active.
Projects.resourcesEmptyDescription: Link books, videos, or materials from your Resource Library to this project.
Projects.noResourcesAvailable: No resources in your library yet.
Projects.deleteConfirmMessage: This will permanently delete this project and all its milestones. This cannot be undone.
Projects.completeConfirmMessage: This will create portfolio entries and achievement badges for each assigned child.
Projects.completeConfirmWarning: The following milestones are still incomplete:
Projects.archiveConfirmMessage: This project will be hidden from active views. Portfolio entries are preserved.
Projects.resourceNotesPlaceholder: Context for why this resource is linked...
Projects.noResources: No resources linked to this project yet.
Projects.portfolioReflectionPlaceholder: The child's or parent's reflection on the work...
Projects.noPortfolioEntries: Portfolio entries will be created when the project is completed.
Projects.noAchievements: No achievements yet. Complete a project to earn badges!

Calendar.title: Calendar
Calendar.subtitle: Family events, milestones, and your full schedule at a glance
Calendar.noEventsThisMonth: No events this month. Add one with the button above.
Calendar.noEventsFiltered: No events match your current filters.
Calendar.deleteConfirm: Delete this event? This cannot be undone.
Calendar.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Field trip to the museum
Calendar.endTimeBeforeStart: End time must be after start time.
Calendar.subjectRequired: Subject is required for subject events.
Calendar.projectRequired: Project is required for project events.

Resources.title: Resource Library
Resources.subtitle: Books, videos, and materials your family is using
Resources.emptyDescription: Add the books, videos, and materials your family is using.
Resources.titlePlaceholder: e.g. The Story of the World
Resources.deleteConfirmMessage: This will also unlink it from {count} subject(s).
Resources.removeFromSubjectMessage: Progress notes for this link will be lost.
Resources.noResourcesForSubject: No resources linked to this subject yet.

Progress.title: Progress
Progress.subtitle: Your teaching log, streaks, and printable reports.
Progress.subject: Subject
Progress.tapSubjectsHint: Tap a subject to mark it taught — tap again to remove.
Progress.noSubjectsYet: Add subjects in your library to log them per-subject here.
Progress.noCadenceYet: Set a weekly cadence in your curriculum to start tracking streaks.
Progress.streakBroken: Streak broken — meet this week's target to restart.
Progress.noPerChildStreaks: No active curriculum assigns a weekly cadence per child yet.
Progress.noPerSubjectStreaks: No subjects are tracked against a weekly cadence yet.
Progress.noHeatmap: No activity in this range yet.
Progress.noLogsYet: No teaching logged yet. Hit the button above to start your streak.
Progress.duplicateLogError: You already logged that combination for this day.
Progress.reportPreviewHint: Click the Print button above to open the printable version.

Family.pageSubtitle: Your household's profile, identity, and members.
Family.saveError: Could not save your changes. Please try again.
Family.inviteHeading: Invite a second parent or educator
Family.inviteIntro: Your spouse, a co-educator, or another trusted adult can share access to this family. This is intended for the people who raise and teach these children with you.
Family.inviteWarningIntro: The person you invite will see and be able to edit:
Family.inviteWarningItem1: Every child's profile, lessons, and progress
Family.inviteWarningItem2: Your family's faith, worldview, and culture notes
Family.inviteWarningItem3: Your calendar, planner, projects, and notes
Family.inviteWarningOutro: Only invite someone you fully trust with this family's data. You can remove their access at any time.
Family.inviteConsent: I understand that this person will have full access to my family's data.
Family.inviteSuccess: Invitation sent to {email}. They have 7 days to accept.
Family.removeMemberBody: They will immediately lose access to all family data. Any content they created stays with the family. This does not delete their Oikos account.
Family.exportBody: Download a JSON archive of your family profile, children, subjects, planner, projects, journal, and progress records.
Family.exportRequested: Export requested. We'll email you when your archive is ready.
Family.deleteBody: This permanently deletes the family, all children profiles, and every record linked to them. This cannot be undone. Your Oikos account will remain and you can create or join a different family afterwards.
Family.deleteConfirmPrompt: Type the family name to confirm:
Family.leaveBody: You will lose access to every child's record, the calendar, planner, journal, and projects in this family. The primary account holder can re-invite you later.

Notes.title: Notes
Notes.subtitle: Your family's notes, tasks, and reflections.
Notes.contentPlaceholder: What's on your mind? Markdown supported.
Notes.tagsPlaceholder: Type a tag and press Enter…
Notes.emptyTitle: You haven't added any notes yet.
Notes.emptyFilterTitle: No notes match your current filters.
